
### jXX: stalling? 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCStall.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCStall.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCStall.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCStall.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::


### making guesses  {.smaller}


```
        cmpq %r8, %r9
        jne LABEL
        xorq %r10, %r11
        movq %r11, 0(%r12)
        ...

LABEL:  addq %r8, %r9
        imul %r13, %r14
        ...

```
 

* speculate (guess): <em>jne</em> won't go to LABEL
* right: 2 cycles faster!; wrong: undo guess before too late


### jXX: speculating right (1) 

![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCYes.figure.svg)


### jXX: speculating wrong 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCNo.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/jCCNo.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::


### ‘‘squashed’’ instructions 


* on misprediction need to undo partially executed instructions
* mostly: remove from pipeline registers
* more complicated pipelines: replace written values in cache/registers/etc.
